title: My Son John
writer: Myles Connolly, John Lee Mahin, Leo McCarey
actors: Robert Walker, Helen Hayes, Van Heflin
plot: The Jeffersons are the ideal picture-perfect all-American family in a small town, but their eldest son John returns home after a long absence spouting views that cause them to worry he may be a Communist.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
